name: Orange Creamsicle Pie
recipeIngredient: 18 Graham crackers, fine crush - about 1-1/4 cup crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the crumb crumbs, sugar, and melted margarine. Press the mixture onto the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie plate.
2. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, blend the softened ice cream and thawed orange juice concentrate with an electric mixer on medium speed until well combined.
4. Spread the blended mixture into the prepared crust.
5. Freeze the pie for about 4 hours until firm.
6. Before serving, garnish with Cool Whip and orange slices.
